subject: GeneralKnowledge
title: GeneralKnowledge Test - 10
description: A mix of fun and educational questions covering animals, geography, science, health, and technology for Grade 4 students.

questions.q: Which animal is the tallest in the world?
questions.explanation: The giraffe is the tallest land animal on Earth thanks to its long neck and long legs.
questions.hint: It has a long neck and spots on its coat.
questions.objective: Identify common animals and their traits.

questions.q: What is the capital of France?
questions.explanation: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.
questions.hint: It is famous for the Eiffel Tower.

questions.q: Which of these is a gas that humans need to breathe in?
questions.explanation: Humans and many other animals need oxygen to survive.
questions.hint: It is the gas that keeps us alive.

questions.q: What do we call the path a planet takes around the Sun?
questions.explanation: An orbit is the curved path that a celestial object takes around a star or planet.
questions.hint: It is a word that starts with 'O'.
questions.objective: Understand basic facts about the solar system.

questions.q: Which of these helps keep your bones strong?
questions.explanation: Calcium is a mineral that is essential for building and maintaining strong bones.
questions.hint: You get a lot of it from dairy products like milk.

questions.q: What is the primary material used in making paper?
questions.explanation: Most paper is made from wood fibers that are processed into pulp.
questions.objective: Understand materials in our everyday life.

questions.q: Which continent is home to the Sahara Desert?
questions.explanation: The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world and covers much of North Africa.
questions.hint: It is a very hot and sandy continent.

questions.q: How many minutes are in one hour?
questions.explanation: There are 60 minutes in every hour.
questions.hint: It is the same number as the seconds in a minute.

questions.q: What do we call a person who treats sick animals?
questions.explanation: A veterinarian is a professional who practices animal medicine.

questions.q: Which force makes a magnet stick to a refrigerator?
questions.explanation: Magnetism is a force of attraction that allows magnets to stick to certain metal surfaces.
